antigua-barbuda.label: Caribbean Citizenship
antigua-barbuda.heroDescription: The Antigua & Barbuda CBI program offers one of the Caribbean's most family-friendly pathways to second citizenship, with competitive pricing for larger families and visa-free access to 151+ countries.
antigua-barbuda.heroSubDescription: Established in 2013, the program is fully government-authorized and internationally recognized. Explore all Caribbean CBI programs:
antigua-barbuda.imageAlt: Antigua & Barbuda citizenship by investment destination
antigua-barbuda.seoTitle: Antigua & Barbuda Citizenship by Investment from $230K | GFC
antigua-barbuda.seoDescription: Antigua & Barbuda citizenship by investment from $230,000 — second passport with 150+ visa-free destinations and family inclusion. Free consultation with GFC.

highlights.title: 151+ Countries
highlights.desc: Visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to over 151 countries worldwide, including the UK and Schengen Area.

highlights.title: Family-Friendly
highlights.desc: Competitive pricing for families with reduced per-dependent costs. Include spouse, children, parents, and grandparents.

highlights.title: Minimal Residency
highlights.desc: Only 5 days of physical presence required within the first 5 years — one of the most flexible CBI programs globally.

highlights.title: 3–6 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Applications are typically processed within 3 to 6 months from submission to approval.

investmentOptions.title: National Development Fund (Donation)
investmentOptions.desc: A non-refundable contribution to the Antigua & Barbuda National Development Fund. The most straightforward route to citizenship.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase government-approved real estate with a minimum holding period of 5 years. The property can generate rental income during the holding period.

investmentOptions.title: Business Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Invest in an approved business venture in Antigua & Barbuda, either individually or as a joint investment with other applicants.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, family structure, and objectives.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: We prepare your complete application package and guide you through the required due diligence.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted to the Citizenship by Investment Unit (CIU) of Antigua & Barbuda.

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, you complete your investment and receive your certificate of citizenship and passport.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and clear background check
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
Good health — basic medical examination required
5 days of physical presence required within the first 5 years
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Antigua & Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program?
faqItems.answer: The Antigua & Barbuda Citizenship by Investment Program (CIP) is a government-authorized program established in 2013 that allows qualified individuals and their families to obtain full citizenship through an approved economic contribution. Applicants can choose from a donation to the National Development Fund, a qualifying real estate purchase, or an approved business investment.

faqItems.question: How much does Antigua & Barbuda CBI cost?
faqItems.answer: The minimum investment starts at $230,000 for a donation to the National Development Fund (for a family of up to 4). Real estate investments start at $325,000 with a 5-year holding requirement. Business investments start at $400,000. Additional government fees, due diligence fees, and processing costs apply depending on the number of dependents.

faqItems.question: How long does the Antigua CBI process take?
faqItems.answer: The Antigua & Barbuda CBI process typically takes 3 to 6 months from the submission of a complete application to the issuance of citizenship and passport. Timelines depend on the thoroughness of documentation and the speed of due diligence clearance.

faqItems.question: What is the residency requirement?
faqItems.answer: Antigua & Barbuda requires just 5 days of physical presence within the first 5 years of citizenship. This is one of the most minimal residency requirements among all CBI programs globally.

antigua-barbuda.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Antigua & Barbuda CBI process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

bulgaria.label: European Golden Visa
bulgaria.heroDescription: Bulgaria's residency by investment program offers access to the EU through real estate or business investment. With Schengen Area membership and competitive investment thresholds, Bulgaria is an emerging destination for global investors.
bulgaria.heroSubDescription: Explore all European Golden Visa programs:
bulgaria.imageAlt: Bulgaria Golden Visa residency by investment destination
bulgaria.seoTitle: Bulgaria Golden Visa | EU Residency with Citizenship Pathway | GFC
bulgaria.seoDescription: Bulgaria Golden Visa — EU residency by investment with a fast-track citizenship pathway and Schengen access for HNW families. Expert advisory from GFC.

highlights.title: EU & Schengen Access
highlights.desc: Bulgaria joined the Schengen Area, granting residence permit holders visa-free travel across member states.

highlights.title: Competitive Threshold
highlights.desc: One of the more affordable EU residency programs with growing investor interest.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse and dependent children in your residence permit application.

highlights.title: 6–9 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Standard residence permit applications are processed within approximately 6 to 9 months from submission.

investmentOptions.title: Government Bonds
investmentOptions.desc: Investment in Bulgarian government bonds held for a minimum of 5 years. Capital is returned at the end of the holding period, making this the most capital-efficient route.

investmentOptions.title: Alternative Investment Fund
investmentOptions.desc: Investment in a licensed Bulgarian alternative investment fund focused on Bulgarian securities. Reduced threshold introduced to attract institutional-grade investors.

investmentOptions.title: Bulgarian Company Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Direct investment in a Bulgarian company, with capital deployed in priority economic sectors and meeting job creation requirements.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility and EU residency objectives.

timeline.title: Investment & Documentation
timeline.desc: Complete your qualifying investment and prepare application documentation.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Submit your residence permit application to the Bulgarian Migration Directorate.

timeline.title: Residence Permit
timeline.desc: Upon approval, receive your residence permit with pathway to permanent residency and citizenship.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Non-EU/EEA national
Clean criminal record
Valid health insurance
Qualifying investment completed
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Bulgaria Golden Visa?
faqItems.answer: Bulgaria's residency by investment program allows non-EU nationals to obtain permanent residence through qualifying investments in government bonds, alternative investment funds, or Bulgarian companies. Bulgaria is a full EU member and joined the Schengen Area in 2024, granting permit holders visa-free travel across member states.

faqItems.question: How much does Bulgaria's Golden Visa cost?
faqItems.answer: The most popular route is a €512,000 investment in Bulgarian government bonds held for 5 years, with the capital returned at maturity. A reduced €256,000 threshold is available via licensed alternative investment funds. Direct company investment requires €1 million.

faqItems.question: Can I get EU citizenship through Bulgaria?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Bulgaria offers a pathway to citizenship after 5 years of permanent residency, granting full EU citizenship and one of the strongest passports in Europe. Citizenship requires meeting residency, language, and integration requirements.

bulgaria.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Bulgaria Golden Visa process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

dominica.label: Caribbean Citizenship
dominica.heroDescription: Consistently ranked as the world's best citizenship by investment program. Dominica offers the most cost-effective pathway to second citizenship with visa-free access to 145+ countries.
dominica.seoTitle: Dominica Citizenship by Investment from $200K | GFC
dominica.seoDescription: Dominica citizenship by investment from $200,000 — one of the most affordable second citizenship programs with 145+ visa-free destinations. Speak with GFC.

highlights.title: 145+ Countries
highlights.desc: Visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to over 145 countries worldwide, including the UK and Schengen Area.

highlights.title: Top-Ranked Program
highlights.desc: Consistently ranked #1 globally by the CBI Index for program quality, due diligence, and value.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children, parents, and grandparents in a single application.

highlights.title: 3–4 Month Processing
highlights.desc: One of the fastest processing times among all CBI programs globally.

investmentOptions.title: Economic Diversification Fund (Donation)
investmentOptions.desc: A non-refundable contribution to the Economic Diversification Fund. The most cost-effective CBI route globally.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase a share in a government-approved real estate development with a minimum holding period of 3 years (5 years if resold to another CBI applicant). Approved projects include luxury resorts and hospitality assets that may generate rental yield.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, family structure, and objectives.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: We prepare your complete application package and guide you through the required background checks.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted to the Dominica Citizenship by Investment Unit.

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, you complete your investment and receive your certificate of citizenship and passport.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record with no ongoing investigations
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
Good health — basic medical examination required
No residency requirement before or after citizenship
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Dominica CBI program?
faqItems.answer: The Dominica Citizenship by Investment Program allows qualified individuals to obtain full Dominican citizenship through a government-approved economic contribution. It is widely regarded as the most cost-effective and best-managed CBI program in the world.

faqItems.question: How much does Dominica CBI cost?
faqItems.answer: The minimum investment starts at $200,000 for a single applicant via the Economic Diversification Fund. Real estate investments also start at $200,000. Government fees and due diligence costs apply.

faqItems.question: How long does Dominica CBI take?
faqItems.answer: Dominica typically processes applications within 3 to 4 months, making it one of the fastest CBI programs available.

dominica.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Dominica CBI process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

greece.label: European Golden Visa
greece.heroDescription: Europe's most affordable Golden Visa program, offering access to the Schengen Area and a pathway to Greek (EU) citizenship after 7 years of residency. Real estate investment starting from €250,000.
greece.heroSubDescription: Explore all European Golden Visa programs:
greece.imageAlt: Greece Golden Visa residency by investment destination
greece.seoTitle: Greece Golden Visa from €250K | EU Residency by Investment | GFC
greece.seoDescription: Greece Golden Visa from €250,000 — Europe's most accessible EU residency by investment with Schengen access. Expert advisory and free consultation with GFC.

highlights.title: 186+ Countries (with citizenship)
highlights.desc: Greek citizenship grants visa-free access to 186+ countries and full EU rights across all member states.

highlights.title: Most Affordable EU Entry
highlights.desc: Starting from €250,000, Greece offers the lowest investment threshold for EU Golden Visa programs.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children under 21, and parents of both the main applicant and spouse.

highlights.title: 3–6 Month Processing
highlights.desc: One of the fastest Golden Visa processing times in Europe.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase real estate in eligible areas of Greece. Athens, Thessaloniki, Mykonos, Santorini, and other high-demand zones now require €800,000, while most other regions require €400,000. The €250,000 threshold remains for commercial-to-residential conversions and listed heritage properties.

investmentOptions.title: Capital Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Investment in Greek government bonds, corporate bonds, shares of Greek-listed companies, or term deposits in a Greek credit institution held for the duration of the permit.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility and EU residency objectives.

timeline.title: Property Selection & Purchase
timeline.desc: Identify and acquire qualifying real estate with our guidance.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Submit your Golden Visa application to the Greek immigration authorities.

timeline.title: Residency Permit
timeline.desc: Receive your 5-year residence permit, renewable indefinitely.

timeline.title: Citizenship Eligibility
timeline.desc: After 7 years of legal residency, apply for Greek (EU) citizenship.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Non-EU/EEA national
Clean criminal record
Valid health insurance covering Greece
Qualifying real estate or capital investment completed
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Greece Golden Visa?
faqItems.answer: The Greece Golden Visa is a residency-by-investment program granting non-EU nationals a 5-year renewable residence permit through qualifying real estate or capital investment. It provides Schengen Area access and a pathway to EU citizenship after 7 years.

faqItems.question: How much does the Greece Golden Visa cost?
faqItems.answer: Real estate investment starts at €250,000 in eligible areas, with some premium locations requiring €500,000. Capital investment alternatives start at €400,000. Government and legal fees apply.

faqItems.question: Do I need to live in Greece?
faqItems.answer: No. The Greece Golden Visa has no minimum stay requirement for maintaining residency. However, 7 years of legal residency is required for citizenship eligibility.

faqItems.question: Can I rent out my Greek property?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Property purchased under the Golden Visa can be rented out, providing rental income while maintaining your residency status.

greece.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Greece Golden Visa process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

grenada.label: Caribbean Citizenship
grenada.heroDescription: The only Caribbean CBI program with E-2 Treaty investor visa access to the United States. Grenada offers a powerful combination of global mobility, U.S. market access, and Caribbean lifestyle.
grenada.seoTitle: Grenada Citizenship by Investment | E-2 Treaty Passport | GFC
grenada.seoDescription: Grenada citizenship by investment with E-2 U.S. treaty visa access — second passport, 145+ visa-free countries, family inclusion. Free consultation with GFC.

highlights.title: 145+ Countries
highlights.desc: Visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to over 145 countries including the UK, EU Schengen Area, China, and Russia.

highlights.title: E-2 Treaty Access
highlights.desc: The only Caribbean CBI with a U.S. E-2 Treaty — enabling you to live and work in the United States as an investor.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children, parents, grandparents, and unmarried siblings in your application.

highlights.title: 4–6 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Applications are typically processed within 4 to 6 months from submission to approval.

investmentOptions.title: National Transformation Fund (Donation)
investmentOptions.desc: A non-refundable contribution to Grenada's National Transformation Fund. The most straightforward pathway to citizenship.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase government-approved real estate with a minimum holding period of 5 years. Approved developments include luxury resorts and hospitality projects.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, family structure, and strategic objectives including E-2 visa planning.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: Comprehensive preparation of your application with meticulous attention to compliance and documentation.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted to Grenada's Citizenship by Investment Committee (CBIC).

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, you complete your investment and receive your certificate of citizenship and passport.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and clear background check
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
Good health — basic medical examination required
No residency requirement before or after citizenship
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Grenada CBI program?
faqItems.answer: The Grenada Citizenship by Investment Program allows qualified individuals and their families to obtain full Grenadian citizenship through a government-approved economic contribution. Grenada is uniquely positioned as the only Caribbean CBI with E-2 Treaty access to the United States.

faqItems.question: How much does Grenada CBI cost?
faqItems.answer: The minimum investment starts at $235,000 for a donation to the National Transformation Fund. Real estate investments start at $270,000. Additional government fees and due diligence costs apply depending on family size.

faqItems.question: What is E-2 Treaty access?
faqItems.answer: Grenada has an E-2 investor visa treaty with the United States. This means Grenadian citizens can apply for the E-2 visa, which allows them to live and work in the U.S. by investing in a U.S.-based business. This is a significant advantage unique to Grenada among Caribbean CBI programs.

faqItems.question: How long does Grenada CBI take?
faqItems.answer: The Grenada CBI process typically takes 4 to 6 months from submission of a complete application to passport issuance.

grenada.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Grenada CBI process, including E-2 Treaty visa planning. Book a confidential consultation.

hungary.label: European Golden Visa
hungary.heroDescription: Hungary's Guest Investor Program offers a pathway to EU residency through investment in Hungarian real estate or government-approved funds. A strategic entry point to Central Europe and the Schengen Area.
hungary.heroSubDescription: Explore all European Golden Visa programs:
hungary.imageAlt: Hungary Golden Visa residency by investment destination
hungary.seoTitle: Hungary Guest Investor Visa from €250K | EU Residency | GFC
hungary.seoDescription: Hungary Guest Investor Visa from €250,000 — ten-year EU residency through regulated real estate funds with Schengen access. Free consultation with GFC.

highlights.title: Schengen Access
highlights.desc: Free movement across all Schengen Area countries with a Hungarian residence permit.

highlights.title: Central EU Location
highlights.desc: Strategic positioning in the heart of Europe with access to the EU single market.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse and dependent children in your residence permit application.

highlights.title: 3–4 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Guest Investor visa applications are typically processed within 3 to 4 months from submission to issuance.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Fund Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Investment in units of a qualifying Hungarian real estate fund registered with the Magyar Nemzeti Bank. Held for a minimum of 5 years — the most popular and accessible route.

investmentOptions.title: Residential Real Estate
investmentOptions.desc: Direct purchase of qualifying residential real estate in Hungary. Subject to ministerial approval and held for a minimum 5-year qualifying period.

investmentOptions.title: Donation to Higher Education
investmentOptions.desc: Non-refundable donation to a Hungarian higher education institution supporting research, teaching, or arts and cultural activities of public benefit.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility and EU residency objectives.

timeline.title: Investment & Documentation
timeline.desc: Complete your qualifying investment and prepare application documentation.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Submit your Guest Investor visa application through the Hungarian authorities.

timeline.title: Residence Permit
timeline.desc: Upon approval, receive your residence permit with pathway to permanent residency.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Non-EU/EEA national
Clean criminal record
Valid health insurance
Qualifying investment completed
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is Hungary's Guest Investor Program?
faqItems.answer: The Hungary Guest Investor Program (Vendégbefektetői Tartózkodási Engedély) is a residency by investment program launched in 2024 that grants non-EU nationals a 10-year renewable residence permit through qualifying investments in real estate funds, property, or higher education donations. Permit holders gain full Schengen Area mobility.

faqItems.question: How much does Hungary's Golden Visa cost?
faqItems.answer: The most accessible route is a €250,000 investment in a registered Hungarian real estate fund held for at least 5 years. Direct residential property purchases require €500,000, and donations to higher education institutions require €1 million.

faqItems.question: Can I get EU citizenship through Hungary?
faqItems.answer: Yes. After 8 years of legal residency in Hungary (reduced to 3 years for those married to a Hungarian citizen), Guest Investor permit holders may apply for naturalisation, subject to language proficiency and integration requirements. Hungarian citizenship grants full EU rights.

hungary.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Hungary Golden Visa process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

latvia.label: European Golden Visa
latvia.heroDescription: Latvia's residence permit by investment program offers access to the EU and Schengen Area through real estate or business investment. A strategic gateway to the Baltic region and Northern Europe.
latvia.heroSubDescription: Explore all European Golden Visa programs:
latvia.imageAlt: Latvia Golden Visa residency by investment destination
latvia.seoTitle: Latvia Golden Visa from €60K | Schengen Residency | GFC
latvia.seoDescription: Latvia Golden Visa from €60,000 — affordable EU residency through business or real estate, with Schengen access and 2–3 month processing. GFC expert advisory.

highlights.title: Schengen Access
highlights.desc: Free movement across all 27 Schengen Area countries with a Latvian residence permit.

highlights.title: EU Gateway
highlights.desc: Strategic access to the European Union single market and Baltic business ecosystem.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse and dependent children in your residence permit application.

highlights.title: 2–3 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Latvia offers one of Europe's fastest Golden Visa processing windows — typically 2 to 3 months from submission to permit issuance.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase qualifying residential or commercial real estate in Latvia with a cadastral value above the legal minimum. The property must be held for the duration of the residence permit.

investmentOptions.title: Business Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Invest €60,000 in equity capital of a Latvian company, plus an annual state fee. The company must employ Latvian residents and contribute meaningful tax revenue.

investmentOptions.title: Subordinated Bank Deposit
investmentOptions.desc: Subordinated deposit in a Latvian credit institution held for a minimum of 5 years. A capital-preserving route with full return at the end of the holding period.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility and EU residency objectives.

timeline.title: Investment & Documentation
timeline.desc: Complete your qualifying investment and prepare application documentation.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Submit your residence permit application to the Latvian Office of Citizenship and Migration Affairs.

timeline.title: Residence Permit
timeline.desc: Upon approval, receive your temporary residence permit with renewal options.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Non-EU/EEA national
Clean criminal record
Valid health insurance
Qualifying investment completed
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Latvia Golden Visa?
faqItems.answer: Latvia's residence permit by investment program, established in 2010, allows non-EU nationals to obtain a temporary residence permit through qualifying investments in real estate, business equity, or subordinated bank deposits. The permit is renewable and grants Schengen mobility.

faqItems.question: How much does the Latvia Golden Visa cost?
faqItems.answer: Investment thresholds start at €60,000 for business investment, €250,000 for qualifying real estate, or €280,000 for a 5-year subordinated bank deposit. Government fees and an annual state contribution apply depending on the chosen route.

faqItems.question: Can I travel freely in the EU with a Latvian residence permit?
faqItems.answer: Yes. A Latvian residence permit grants visa-free travel across the Schengen Area for up to 90 days in any 180-day period. You can live and work in Latvia with full residency rights.

latvia.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Latvia Golden Visa process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

malta.label: European Permanent Residency
malta.heroDescription: The Malta Permanent Residence Programme (MPRP) grants high-net-worth families lifetime EU residency on a stable, English-speaking Mediterranean island with Schengen access and a globally respected regulatory environment.
malta.imageAlt: Malta Permanent Residence Programme — Mediterranean EU residency
malta.seoTitle: Malta Permanent Residency Programme (MPRP) | EU Residence | GFC
malta.seoDescription: Malta Permanent Residence Programme (MPRP) — lifetime EU residency with Schengen access from an English-speaking Mediterranean base. Expert advisory from GFC.

highlights.title: Schengen Access
highlights.desc: Visa-free travel across the 27-country Schengen Area for residence-card holders and qualifying dependents.

highlights.title: EU Stability
highlights.desc: Permanent residency in a politically stable, English-speaking EU member state with a common-law-influenced legal system.

highlights.title: Multi-Generational
highlights.desc: Include spouse, children of any age (financially dependent), and parents and grandparents of both applicant and spouse.

highlights.title: 4–6 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Government processing typically completes within 4 to 6 months of a complete submission.

investmentOptions.title: Government Contribution + Property Rental
investmentOptions.desc: Non-refundable government contribution combined with a qualifying long-term residential lease in Malta or Gozo, plus an administrative fee and a charitable donation.

investmentOptions.title: Government Contribution + Property Purchase
investmentOptions.desc: Government contribution combined with the purchase of qualifying residential property in Malta or Gozo, held for the required 5-year period.

timeline.title: Eligibility Review
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your family structure, source-of-funds documentation, and qualifying assets.

timeline.title: Application Preparation
timeline.desc: Through a licensed agent: full document set, due diligence, and submission to Residency Malta Agency.

timeline.title: Approval in Principle
timeline.desc: Government approval in principle, after which you complete the qualifying property and contribution requirements.

timeline.title: Residence Cards Issued
timeline.desc: Permanent residence cards issued to the main applicant and all approved dependants.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age and non-EU/EEA/Swiss nationals
Hold capital assets of at least €500,000, of which €150,000 must be financial assets
Clean criminal record and successful four-tier due diligence
Hold qualifying property for a minimum of 5 years
Comprehensive sickness insurance covering all of Malta
Documented legal source of investment funds and assets

faqItems.question: Does MPRP grant Maltese citizenship?
faqItems.answer: No. MPRP grants permanent residency in Malta with Schengen access. Global Freedom Capital advises on the MPRP residency route only and does not advise on Maltese citizenship by naturalisation.

faqItems.question: Do I need to live in Malta?
faqItems.answer: There is no minimum physical presence requirement to maintain MPRP status, but residence cards must be renewed and the qualifying property must be held throughout the 5-year qualifying period.

faqItems.question: Who can be included?
faqItems.answer: Spouse or partner, financially dependent children of any age, and parents and grandparents of both the main applicant and spouse may be included as dependants, subject to due diligence.

faqItems.question: How long does MPRP take?
faqItems.answer: From a complete submission, government processing typically completes within 4 to 6 months. Full timeline including property and document preparation is generally 6 to 9 months.

malta.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through MPRP eligibility, qualifying property selection, and the full application via a licensed agent. Book a confidential consultation.

panama.label: Latin American Residency
panama.heroDescription: Panama's Qualified Investor Visa and Friendly Nations Visa offer fast paths to permanent residency in a USD-denominated, territorial-tax economy with strong banking, a strategic shipping hub, and a clear pathway to naturalization.
panama.heroSubDescription: Compare other residency by investment programs:
panama.imageAlt: Panama Qualified Investor Visa — Panama City skyline
panama.seoTitle: Panama Qualified Investor Visa from $300K | Residency | GFC
panama.seoDescription: Panama Qualified Investor Visa from $300,000 in real estate — permanent residency in a USD-denominated economy with territorial taxation. GFC expert advisory.

highlights.title: Strategic Hub
highlights.desc: Premier connectivity hub for the Americas with the Panama Canal, Tocumen International Airport, and one of Latin America's strongest banking sectors.

highlights.title: Territorial Taxation
highlights.desc: Panama applies territorial taxation: foreign-source income is generally not subject to Panamanian income tax, supporting efficient international structuring.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children, and dependent parents in the same application, with permanent residency granted to all approved members.

highlights.title: 30–60 Day Processing
highlights.desc: Qualified Investor Visa applications are designed for fast processing, typically completing within 30 to 60 days of submission.

investmentOptions.title: Qualified Investor — Real Estate
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase real estate in your personal name, free of liens, held for a minimum of 5 years. The most direct route to permanent residency.

investmentOptions.title: Qualified Investor — Securities
investmentOptions.desc: Investment through a licensed Panamanian brokerage in a qualifying securities portfolio, held for a minimum of 5 years.

investmentOptions.title: Qualified Investor — Fixed-Term Deposit
investmentOptions.desc: Fixed-term deposit with a Panamanian bank for a minimum of 5 years, free of liens and held in the applicant's personal name.

timeline.title: Strategic Consultation
timeline.desc: Assessment of your residency objectives, source-of-funds documentation, and the qualifying route best suited to your profile.

timeline.title: Investment Execution
timeline.desc: Real estate acquisition, securities investment, or bank deposit completed through licensed Panamanian counterparties.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Filing with Panama's National Migration Service (Servicio Nacional de Migración), supported by full KYC and source-of-funds documentation.

timeline.title: Permanent Residency Granted
timeline.desc: Permanent residency cards issued to the main applicant and all approved dependants. Citizenship eligibility after 5 years of residency.

eligibility: Main applicant must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record from country of residence
Documented legal source of investment funds
Hold qualifying investment for a minimum of 5 years
Health certificate from a licensed Panamanian physician
Personal appearance in Panama for biometrics and document filing

faqItems.question: How fast is the Panama Qualified Investor Visa?
faqItems.answer: The Qualified Investor Visa is designed for expedited processing, with permanent residency typically granted within 30 to 60 days of a complete submission.

faqItems.question: What is the minimum investment for Panama residency?
faqItems.answer: The minimum is $300,000 for the real estate route, $500,000 for a qualifying securities portfolio, or $750,000 for a fixed-term bank deposit, each held for 5 years.

faqItems.question: Does Panama use territorial taxation?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Panama operates a territorial tax system: in general, only Panama-source income is subject to Panamanian income tax. Specific structures should be reviewed with a qualified tax advisor.

faqItems.question: Can I obtain Panamanian citizenship?
faqItems.answer: Permanent residents are generally eligible to apply for naturalization after 5 years of residency, subject to language, integration, and procedural requirements determined by Panamanian authorities.

panama.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through Qualified Investor route selection, qualifying asset acquisition, and end-to-end residency application. Book a confidential consultation.

portugal.label: European Golden Visa
portugal.heroDescription: One of Europe's most popular Golden Visa programs, offering a clear pathway to EU citizenship within 5 years. Portugal's high quality of life, favorable tax regime, and access to the Schengen Area make it a premier destination.
portugal.heroSubDescription: Explore all European Golden Visa programs:
portugal.imageAlt: Portugal Golden Visa residency by investment destination
portugal.seoTitle: Portugal Golden Visa | EU Citizenship Pathway from €250K | GFC
portugal.seoDescription: Portugal Golden Visa from €250,000 — EU residency with citizenship pathway after five years and Schengen access. Expert investment migration advisory from GFC.

highlights.title: 188+ Countries (with citizenship)
highlights.desc: Portuguese citizenship grants one of the world's most powerful passports with visa-free access to 188+ countries.

highlights.title: EU Citizenship Pathway
highlights.desc: Clear pathway to full EU citizenship after 5 years of residency, with minimal physical presence requirements.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children, and parents in your application. Family reunification provisions available.

highlights.title: 6–12 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Initial Golden Visa approval typically within 6 to 12 months. Citizenship eligibility after 5 years.

investmentOptions.title: Investment Fund Subscription
investmentOptions.desc: Subscription of units in qualifying Portuguese venture capital or private equity funds regulated by the CMVM. Funds must have at least 60% of investments in Portuguese companies. The primary route following the 2023 real estate reforms.

investmentOptions.title: Research & Development
investmentOptions.desc: Capital transfer to support research activities conducted by accredited Portuguese public or private research institutions.

investmentOptions.title: Company Formation & Job Creation
investmentOptions.desc: Incorporate or capitalise a Portuguese commercial company with the creation of at least 5 permanent jobs, or invest €500,000 in an existing Portuguese company creating or maintaining 5 jobs for 3 years.

investmentOptions.title: Cultural Heritage Donation
investmentOptions.desc: Donation supporting artistic production or the recovery of national cultural heritage through approved public or private entities — the lowest entry point currently available.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, family structure, and long-term EU objectives.

timeline.title: Investment & Documentation
timeline.desc: Complete your qualifying investment and prepare your application documentation.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted to the Portuguese Immigration and Borders Service (SEF/AIMA).

timeline.title: Residency & Renewal
timeline.desc: Upon approval, receive your residence permit. Renew every 2 years with minimal stay requirements.

timeline.title: Citizenship Eligibility
timeline.desc: After 5 years of legal residency, apply for Portuguese (EU) citizenship.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Non-EU/EEA/Swiss national
Clean criminal record
Qualifying investment completed before application
Minimum 7-day stay in Portugal per year (14 days in subsequent 2-year periods)
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Portugal Golden Visa?
faqItems.answer: The Portugal Golden Visa is a residency-by-investment program that grants non-EU nationals a residence permit in Portugal through a qualifying investment. It provides access to the Schengen Area and a pathway to Portuguese (EU) citizenship after 5 years.

faqItems.question: How much does the Portugal Golden Visa cost?
faqItems.answer: The standard minimum is €500,000 via qualifying investment funds, R&D contributions, or company formation with job creation. A €250,000 entry point is available through cultural heritage donations. The real estate route was discontinued in October 2023. Government and legal fees apply.

faqItems.question: Can I get EU citizenship through Portugal's Golden Visa?
faqItems.answer: Yes. After 5 years of legal residency under the Golden Visa program, you can apply for Portuguese citizenship, which grants full EU citizenship and one of the world's most powerful passports.

faqItems.question: Do I need to live in Portugal?
faqItems.answer: The Golden Visa has minimal stay requirements — just 7 days in the first year and 14 days in each subsequent 2-year period. You do not need to relocate full-time.

portugal.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Portugal Golden Visa process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

saint-kitts-nevis.label: Caribbean Citizenship
saint-kitts-nevis.heroDescription: The world's oldest and most established citizenship by investment program, operating since 1984. Saint Kitts & Nevis offers a trusted pathway to second citizenship with visa-free access to 157+ countries.
saint-kitts-nevis.imageAlt: Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship by investment destination
saint-kitts-nevis.seoTitle: Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment | GFC
saint-kitts-nevis.seoDescription: Saint Kitts & Nevis runs the original citizenship by investment program — second passport, 150+ visa-free countries, fast processing. Speak with GFC advisors.

highlights.title: 157+ Countries
highlights.desc: Visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to over 157 countries including the UK, EU Schengen Area, and Singapore.

highlights.title: Established Since 1984
highlights.desc: The world's longest-running CBI program with a proven track record of stability and international recognition.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children, parents, and grandparents in a single application.

highlights.title: 3–6 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Standard processing within 3 to 6 months. Accelerated processing available for qualifying applicants.

investmentOptions.title: Sustainable Island State Contribution (SISC)
investmentOptions.desc: A non-refundable contribution to the Sustainable Island State Contribution fund. The most direct route to citizenship.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase government-approved real estate with a minimum holding period. Properties can generate rental income during the holding period.

investmentOptions.title: Private Home Sale Option
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase a privately-owned approved residence (a single-family home rather than a development share), held for a minimum of 7 years. Suited to investors seeking direct ownership of a Caribbean residence.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, family structure, and objectives.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: We prepare your complete application package and guide you through the required background checks.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted to the Citizenship by Investment Unit (CIU) of Saint Kitts & Nevis.

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, you complete your investment and receive your certificate of citizenship and passport.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record with no prior visa refusals to partnered nations
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
Good health — basic medical examination required
No residency requirement before or after citizenship
Documented legal source of investment funds

faqItems.question: What is the Saint Kitts & Nevis CBI program?
faqItems.answer: The Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment Program is the world's oldest CBI program, established in 1984. It allows qualified individuals and their families to obtain full citizenship through an approved economic contribution — either a donation to the SISC fund or a qualifying real estate investment.

faqItems.question: How much does Saint Kitts CBI cost?
faqItems.answer: The minimum investment starts at $250,000 for a contribution to the Sustainable Island State Contribution fund. Real estate investments start at $325,000. Additional government fees, due diligence fees, and processing costs apply depending on the number of dependents.

faqItems.question: How long does the Saint Kitts CBI process take?
faqItems.answer: The process typically takes 3 to 6 months from submission of a complete application. Accelerated processing options are available for qualifying applicants who need expedited timelines.

faqItems.question: Can I include my family?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can include your spouse, dependent children (typically up to age 30), parents and grandparents (55+), and in some cases, unmarried siblings. Saint Kitts offers broad family inclusion options.

saint-kitts-nevis.faqHeading: Saint Kitts & Nevis CBI — Common Questions
saint-kitts-nevis.ctaHeading: Ready to Explore Saint Kitts & Nevis?
saint-kitts-nevis.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Saint Kitts & Nevis CBI process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

saint-lucia.label: Caribbean Citizenship
saint-lucia.heroDescription: Saint Lucia offers one of the most efficient and flexible citizenship-by-investment programs globally. Designed for high-net-worth individuals seeking global mobility, tax efficiency, and a strategic Plan B — without relocation.
saint-lucia.imageAlt: Saint Lucia citizenship by investment destination
saint-lucia.seoTitle: Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment | Bond & Donation Routes | GFC
saint-lucia.seoDescription: Saint Lucia citizenship by investment with flexible options including government bonds and donations. 146+ visa-free countries. Expert advisory from GFC.

highlights.title: 140+ Countries
highlights.desc: Visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to over 140 countries including the UK and EU Schengen Area.

highlights.title: No Worldwide Tax
highlights.desc: No tax on worldwide income. No residency requirement before or after citizenship.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, dependent children up to age 30, and parents aged 55+.

highlights.title: ~3 Month Processing
highlights.desc: One of the fastest processing times among Caribbean CBI programs.

investmentOptions.title: National Economic Fund (Donation)
investmentOptions.desc: A non-refundable contribution to the Saint Lucia National Economic Fund. The most straightforward route, ideal for families of four.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase government-approved real estate with a minimum holding period of 5 years. Combines immigration qualification with a tangible asset.

investmentOptions.title: Enterprise Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Investment in an approved enterprise project in Saint Lucia, contributing to the country's economic development.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, family structure, and objectives.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: We prepare your complete application and guide you through the required background checks.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted to the Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment Board.

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, you complete your investment and receive your certificate of citizenship and passport.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and clear background check
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
Good health — basic medical examination required
No residency requirement before or after citizenship
Dual citizenship is permitted

faqItems.question: What is the Saint Lucia CBI program?
faqItems.answer: The Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment Program was established in 2015 and allows qualified individuals to obtain full citizenship through a government-approved economic contribution. It offers multiple flexible investment options including donation, real estate, and enterprise projects.

faqItems.question: How much does Saint Lucia CBI cost?
faqItems.answer: The National Economic Fund donation starts at $240,000 for a family of four. Real estate options start at $300,000 with a 5-year hold period. Enterprise investments start at $250,000. Government fees and due diligence costs apply.

faqItems.question: How long does Saint Lucia CBI take?
faqItems.answer: Saint Lucia typically processes applications in approximately 3 months, making it one of the fastest Caribbean CBI programs.

saint-lucia.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through every step of the Saint Lucia CBI process. Book a confidential consultation to get started.

sao-tome-and-principe.label: African Citizenship
sao-tome-and-principe.heroDescription: A newly launched and highly strategic citizenship program positioned for forward-thinking global investors. Ideal for those seeking diversification, speed, and early access to an emerging passport. 🏅 Global Freedom Capital is a licensed agent for the São Tomé & Príncipe Citizenship by Investment Program, providing direct access, verified processing, and concierge-level guidance throughout the entire application journey.
sao-tome-and-principe.imageAlt: São Tomé and Príncipe citizenship by investment destination
sao-tome-and-principe.seoTitle: São Tomé & Príncipe Citizenship by Investment from $90K | GFC
sao-tome-and-principe.seoDescription: São Tomé & Príncipe citizenship by investment from $90,000 — a discreet, fast-track second passport program for HNW families. Expert advisory from GFC.

highlights.title: 2–3 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Fast-track processing for qualified applicants seeking rapid citizenship acquisition.

highlights.title: Clean Compliance
highlights.desc: Not on FATF grey or black lists. Outside U.S. visa restriction lists. Clean international standing.

highlights.title: ECOWAS Mobility
highlights.desc: Access to ECOWAS regional mobility and strategic positioning for future passport growth.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse, children up to 30, and parents aged 55+ with additional government fees.

investmentOptions.title: National Transformation Fund (Donation)
investmentOptions.desc: One of the most affordable citizenship programs globally. A non-refundable contribution to the National Transformation Fund for a single applicant.

investmentOptions.title: Family Application
investmentOptions.desc: Include spouse, children up to age 30, and parents aged 55+. Additional government fees apply per dependent.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility, objectives, and family structure with our licensed advisory team.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: Complete application preparation with thorough background checks and compliance verification.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted directly through our licensed agent channel for priority processing.

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, complete your contribution and receive your certificate of citizenship and passport.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and clear background check
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
No residency requirement before or after citizenship
Dual citizenship is permitted
Good health — basic medical examination required

faqItems.question: What is the São Tomé & Príncipe CBI program?
faqItems.answer: The São Tomé & Príncipe Citizenship by Investment Program is a newly launched program that allows qualified individuals to obtain citizenship through a contribution to the National Transformation Fund. It is one of the most affordable CBI programs globally.

faqItems.question: How much does São Tomé & Príncipe CBI cost?
faqItems.answer: The minimum contribution starts at $90,000 for a single applicant, making it one of the most cost-effective citizenship programs available. Additional government fees apply for family members.

faqItems.question: Is Global Freedom Capital a licensed agent?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Global Freedom Capital is a licensed agent for the São Tomé & Príncipe Citizenship by Investment Program, providing direct access to the program with verified processing and concierge-level guidance.

sao-tome-and-principe.faqHeading: São Tomé & Príncipe CBI — Common Questions
sao-tome-and-principe.ctaHeading: Ready to Explore São Tomé & Príncipe?
sao-tome-and-principe.ctaDescription: As a licensed agent, we provide direct access and concierge-level guidance for the São Tomé & Príncipe CBI program. Book a confidential consultation.

sierra-leone.label: African Citizenship
sierra-leone.heroDescription: A fast-growing program designed for investors seeking speed, affordability, and strategic access to Africa. The 'Go For Gold' structure allows cost optimization — especially for families and partners applying together. 💡 Two families or partners can apply together to optimize overall cost per family. Global Freedom Capital provides on-the-ground support and strategic advisory for the Sierra Leone 'Go For Gold' Program, ensuring a seamless, compliant, and efficient application process for international clients.
sierra-leone.imageAlt: Sierra Leone Go For Gold citizenship program destination
sierra-leone.seoTitle: Sierra Leone Go For Gold Citizenship from $140K | GFC
sierra-leone.seoDescription: Sierra Leone Go For Gold citizenship by investment from $140,000 — fast-track second passport in 2–4 months with family inclusion. Speak with GFC advisors.

highlights.title: 2–4 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Streamlined application process with fast and flexible processing timelines.

highlights.title: Cost Optimization
highlights.desc: Under $100K per family achievable with strategic structuring. Two families can apply together.

highlights.title: Africa Access
highlights.desc: Emerging passport with future growth potential and strategic access to Africa.

highlights.title: Family Friendly
highlights.desc: Include spouse and children under 18. Dual citizenship is permitted.

investmentOptions.title: Main Applicant Contribution
investmentOptions.desc: Contribution-based citizenship for the main applicant with streamlined processing.

investmentOptions.title: Spouse Addition
investmentOptions.desc: Add your spouse to the application for an additional $10,000 contribution.

investmentOptions.title: Child (Under 18)
investmentOptions.desc: Each child under 18 can be included for an additional $10,000 per child.

investmentOptions.title: Due Diligence Fee
investmentOptions.desc: Standard due diligence and background check fee per application.

timeline.title: Initial Consultation
timeline.desc: Confidential assessment of your eligibility and exploration of cost optimization strategies for families.

timeline.title: Documentation & Due Diligence
timeline.desc: Complete application preparation with thorough background checks and compliance verification.

timeline.title: Application Submission
timeline.desc: Your application is submitted through our on-the-ground advisory channel.

timeline.title: Approval & Citizenship
timeline.desc: Upon approval, complete your contribution and receive your certificate of citizenship.

eligibility: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and clear background check
Legitimate source of funds documentation required
No residency requirement before or after citizenship
Dual citizenship is permitted
Good health — basic medical examination required

faqItems.question: What is the Sierra Leone Go For Gold program?
faqItems.answer: The Sierra Leone 'Go For Gold' program is a contribution-based citizenship program designed for investors seeking speed, affordability, and strategic access to Africa. It allows cost optimization through joint family applications.

faqItems.question: How much does Sierra Leone citizenship cost?
faqItems.answer: The main applicant contribution starts at $140,000. Spouse addition is $10,000, each child under 18 is $10,000, and due diligence is approximately $5,000. Two families can apply together to optimize overall cost.

faqItems.question: How long does the Sierra Leone process take?
faqItems.answer: Applications are typically processed within 2 to 4 months from submission of a complete application.

sierra-leone.ctaDescription: Our team provides on-the-ground support and strategic advisory for the Sierra Leone Go For Gold Program. Book a confidential consultation.

turkey.label: Transcontinental Citizenship
turkey.heroDescription: Turkey's Citizenship by Investment program offers fast-track second citizenship through real estate or capital investment, providing a strategic base between Europe, Asia, and the Middle East with a passport that includes E-2 treaty access to the United States.
turkey.heroSubDescription: Compare other citizenship by investment programs:
turkey.imageAlt: Turkey citizenship by investment — Istanbul real estate and skyline
turkey.seoTitle: Turkey Citizenship by Investment | E-2 Treaty Access | GFC
turkey.seoDescription: Turkey citizenship by investment from $400,000 in real estate — fast-track second passport with E-2 U.S. treaty access and 110+ visa-free destinations.

highlights.title: 110+ Countries
highlights.desc: Visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to 110+ destinations including Japan, Singapore, South Korea, and Hong Kong.

highlights.title: E-2 Treaty Access
highlights.desc: Turkish citizens are eligible to apply for the U.S. E-2 investor visa, enabling residence in the United States through a qualifying U.S. business.

highlights.title: Family Inclusion
highlights.desc: Include spouse and dependent children under 18 in a single application, with no requirement to renounce existing citizenship.

highlights.title: 3–6 Month Processing
highlights.desc: One of the fastest CBI programs globally, with passports typically issued within 3 to 6 months.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase qualifying real estate held for a minimum of 3 years. The most popular route, particularly for Istanbul and coastal markets.

investmentOptions.title: Capital Deposit
investmentOptions.desc: Fixed deposit in a Turkish bank held for a minimum of 3 years, in USD or equivalent foreign currency.

investmentOptions.title: Government Bonds / Fund Subscription
investmentOptions.desc: Investment in government bonds or a qualifying real estate investment fund, held for a minimum of 3 years.

timeline.title: Strategic Consultation
timeline.desc: Assessment of your objectives, family composition, and the investment route best suited to your portfolio.

timeline.title: Investment & Valuation
timeline.desc: Property selection and SPK-licensed valuation, or completion of the qualifying capital investment.

timeline.title: Residency & Citizenship Filing
timeline.desc: Short-term residency permit issued, followed by the citizenship application supported by full due-diligence documentation.

timeline.title: Passport Issuance
timeline.desc: Citizenship granted by Presidential decree; Turkish passports issued for the main applicant and all approved family members.

eligibility: Main applicant must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and successful background check
Documented legal source of investment funds
Hold qualifying investment for a minimum of 3 years
Dual citizenship permitted — no need to renounce existing nationality
No prior residency requirement before application

faqItems.question: How fast is the Turkey CBI process?
faqItems.answer: Turkey is among the fastest citizenship by investment programs, with passports typically issued within 3 to 6 months from a complete application.

faqItems.question: What is the minimum investment for Turkey CBI?
faqItems.answer: The minimum investment starts at $400,000 for the real estate route, $500,000 for a bank deposit, government bonds, or a qualifying investment fund subscription, each held for 3 years.

faqItems.question: Does Turkey allow dual citizenship?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Turkey permits dual citizenship, so applicants are not required to renounce their existing nationality.

faqItems.question: Can Turkish citizens apply for the U.S. E-2 visa?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Turkey holds an E-2 treaty with the United States, enabling Turkish citizens to apply for the E-2 investor visa through a qualifying U.S. business investment.

turkey.faqHeading: Turkey Citizenship by Investment — Common Questions
turkey.ctaDescription: Our advisors will guide you through investment-route selection, property due diligence, and end-to-end citizenship application. Book a confidential consultation.

uae.label: Tax-Efficient Residency
uae.heroDescription: The UAE Golden Visa offers a 10-year renewable residency in one of the world's most dynamic, tax-efficient jurisdictions. A premier base for entrepreneurs, investors, and family offices seeking global mobility from a stable Gulf hub.
uae.heroSubDescription: Compare other residency by investment programs:
uae.imageAlt: UAE Golden Visa — Dubai skyline residency by investment
uae.seoTitle: UAE Golden Visa | 10-Year Dubai Residency by Investment | GFC
uae.seoDescription: UAE Golden Visa from AED 2M (~$545K) in real estate or qualifying capital — 10-year renewable residency with 0% personal income tax. Expert advisory from GFC.

highlights.title: Global Hub
highlights.desc: Strategic Gulf base with world-class connectivity to Europe, Asia, and Africa, anchored by Dubai and Abu Dhabi international airports.

highlights.title: Tax-Efficient
highlights.desc: 0% personal income tax on salaries and most personal investment income, with a competitive 9% corporate tax regime above the AED 375K threshold.

highlights.title: Family Sponsorship
highlights.desc: Sponsor spouse, children, and parents under the same Golden Visa. No employer sponsor required for the main applicant.

highlights.title: 2–4 Month Processing
highlights.desc: Initial entry permit and residence visa typically issued within 2 to 4 months of a complete application.

investmentOptions.title: Real Estate Investment
investmentOptions.desc: Purchase qualifying ready or off-plan property in the UAE. Mortgaged property is permitted subject to bank confirmation and minimum equity requirements.

investmentOptions.title: Public Investment / Fund
investmentOptions.desc: Capital deposit with an accredited UAE investment fund or business investment, supported by audited financials and a licence from the relevant authority.

investmentOptions.title: Specialized Talent / Entrepreneur Tracks
investmentOptions.desc: Distinct Golden Visa categories for founders of approved start-ups, investors in licensed businesses, and individuals with specialized scientific, medical, or creative talent.

timeline.title: Strategic Consultation
timeline.desc: Assessment of the most appropriate Golden Visa category for your profile, family, and asset structure.

timeline.title: Investment & Documentation
timeline.desc: Property purchase or capital deployment, supported by full source-of-funds and KYC documentation.

timeline.title: Application & Medical
timeline.desc: Submission to the relevant emirate authority (Dubai/Abu Dhabi), medical fitness test, and Emirates ID biometrics.

timeline.title: 10-Year Residency Granted
timeline.desc: Golden Visa and Emirates ID issued for the main applicant and sponsored dependants, renewable on the same terms.

eligibility: Main applicant must be at least 18 years of age
Clean criminal record and security clearance
Valid medical fitness test in the UAE
Documented legal source of investment funds
Hold qualifying real estate or investment for the visa duration
Comprehensive UAE health insurance for the main applicant and dependants

faqItems.question: Does the UAE Golden Visa lead to citizenship?
faqItems.answer: No. The UAE Golden Visa grants long-term renewable residency. UAE citizenship is exceptional and not part of the Golden Visa programme.

faqItems.question: Do I have to live in the UAE full-time?
faqItems.answer: No. Golden Visa holders are not subject to the standard 6-month absence rule that applies to ordinary UAE residence visas, providing significant flexibility for internationally mobile families.

faqItems.question: Is the UAE actually tax-free?
faqItems.answer: There is no personal income tax in the UAE. Corporate tax of 9% applies to qualifying business profits above AED 375K. VAT is 5%. Tax residency status should be reviewed with a qualified tax advisor in your home jurisdiction.

faqItems.question: Can I include my family?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Spouse, children, and parents may be sponsored under the main applicant's Golden Visa, subject to documentation and applicable health insurance requirements.

uae.ctaDescription: Our advisors will help you select the right Golden Visa track, structure your qualifying investment, and manage end-to-end application. Book a confidential consultation.
